phrases.text_local: Onde é o controlo de segurança?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW koongt-RAW-loo DIH seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o controlo de segurança.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW koongt-RAW-loo DIH seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to security control.

responses.english: Follow the signs to security control.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW koongt-RAW-loo DIH seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o controlo de segurança.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de autocheck-in?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH ow-TOH-shehk-EEN?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os quiosques de autocheck-in.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH ow-TOH-shehk-EEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the self-check-in kiosks.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the self-check-in kiosks.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH ow-TOH-shehk-EEN.
responses.local: Siga as placas para os quiosques de autocheck-in.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de embarque?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih?
phrases.cultural_note: Airport staff prioritize clear, visual cues to manage passenger flow efficiently during peak hours.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as setas verdes.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH SEH-tuhsh VEH-ruh-dihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the green arrows.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the green arrows.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH SEH-tuhsh VEH-ruh-dihsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga as setas verdes.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o miradouro do aeroporto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO uhih-roo-POH-ruh-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Viewpoints are often directed with cardinal references to help tourists navigate open areas quickly.

likely_response.local: Fica no terraço do terminal, com vista para as pistas.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NOO teh-RAH-soo DOO tih-ruh-mee-NAHL, KOHM VEESH-tuh PUH-ruh UHSH PEESH-tuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: It's on the terminal rooftop, overlooking the runways.

responses.english: It's on the terminal rooftop, overlooking the runways.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NOO teh-RAH-soo DOO tih-ruh-mee-NAHL, KOHM VEESH-tuh PUH-ruh UHSH PEESH-tuhsh.
responses.local: Fica no terraço do terminal, com vista para as pistas.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala de Embarque?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih?
phrases.cultural_note: The departure lounge offers seating, shops, and restrooms.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de Embarque.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the departure lounge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the departure lounge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de Embarque.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o controlo de segurança?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW koongt-RAW-loo DIH seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: Security control is a standard procedure; have your documents ready.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Controlo de Segurança.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW koongt-RAW-loo DIH seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Security Control.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso deixar a minha bagagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo day-SHAHR AH MEE-nyuh buh-GAH-zhayng?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de entrega de bagagem.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH ayngt-REH-guh DIH buh-GAH-zhayng.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the baggage drop-off counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the baggage drop-off counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH ayngt-REH-guh DIH buh-GAH-zhayng.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de entrega de bagagem.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the departure terminal is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terminal de partidas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW tih-ruh-mee-NAHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff emphasize ground-level access to prevent confusion with arriving passenger flows.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Terminal de Partidas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW tih-ruh-mee-NAHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Departure Terminal.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Departure Terminal.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW tih-ruh-mee-NAHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Terminal de Partidas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the baggage claim is
phrases.text_local: Onde é a recolha de bagagens?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH reh-KOH-lyuh DIH buh-GAH-zhayngsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Baggage areas are consistently referenced with floor levels and proximity to exits for efficiency.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Recolha de Bagagens.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh reh-KOH-lyuh DIH buh-GAH-zhayngsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Baggage Claim.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Baggage Claim.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh reh-KOH-lyuh DIH buh-GAH-zhayngsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para Recolha de Bagagens.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I drop off luggage?
phrases.cultural_note: In Madeira Airport, baggage drop counters are clearly signposted near check-in. Staff expect direct questions.

likely_response.local: No balcão de entrega de bagagem, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH ayngt-REH-guh DIH buh-GAH-zhayng, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the baggage drop-off counter, on the right.

responses.english: At the baggage drop-off counter, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH ayngt-REH-guh DIH buh-GAH-zhayng, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: No balcão de entrega de bagagem, à direita.
